/bin/zsh -lc "sed -n '90,130p' sympy/polys/factortools.py
./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import *
from sympy.polys.factortools import dmp_ext_factor,dmp_factor_list
x,y=symbols('x y')
p=Poly(expand((x-1)*(y-1)),x,y,extension=I)
print('rep',p.rep.rep,'lev',p.rep.lev,'dom',p.domain)
print('terms gcd?', __import__('sympy.polys.densebasic',fromlist=['dmp_terms_gcd']).dmp_terms_gcd(p.rep.rep,p.rep.lev,p.domain))
print('ext',dmp_ext_factor(p.rep.rep,p.rep.lev,p.domain))
print('list',dmp_factor_list(p.rep.rep,p.rep.lev,p.domain))
PY"

 h=dmp_convert(factor,u,K.dom,K); h,_,g=dmp_inner_gcd(h,g,u,K); h=dmp_compose(h,H,u,K); out.append(h)

for factor,_ in factors:
 h=dmp_convert(factor,u,K.dom,K); h,_,g=dmp_inner_gcd(h,g,u,K); h=dmp_compose(h,H,u,K); out.append(h)
